_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Sanitize and minimize information to protect sources and methods.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of training data integrity risks, including data poisoning attack vectors, supply chain contamination, label manipulation, and the detection and prevention methods for each.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.449), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.412).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [methods]. DCWF-only terms [information, minimize, protect, sanitize, sources] vs WIDAI-only terms [attack, chain, contamination, data, detection, integrity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.869, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Sanitize and minimize information to protect sources and methods." and "Knowledge of training data integrity risks, including data poisoning attack vect" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.509 ≈ STS 0.521 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [methods] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [methods]. DCWF-only: [information, minimize, protect, sanitize, sources]. WIDAI-only: [attack, chain, contamination, data, detection, integrity].
